name: Host Hotels & Resorts, Inc.
description: Host Hotels & Resorts, Inc. is an S&P 500 company and the largest lodging real estate investment trust (REIT) in the United States. The company primarily owns luxury and upper-upscale hotels in major United States markets, partnering with leading brands such as Marriott, Ritz-Carlton, Hyatt, Hilton, and Westin. Host Hotels & Resorts focuses on active asset management, strategic capital allocation, and maintaining a strong balance sheet to drive long-term value for its shareholders.
